title: Bioactive Mycoconstituents of Pleurotus opuntiae: A Novel Frontier in Combating Antimicrobial Resistance
description: This article comprehensively explores the antimicrobial potential of Pleurotus opuntiae, an underexplored medicinal mushroom. It synthesizes foundational research validating the anti-infective efficacy of P. opuntiae extracts against a panel of multidrug-resistant pathogens, covering identification of bioactive compounds, extraction methods, and potential therapeutic strategies.
audience: Researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
